```lean
theorem perm_eraseIdx {l1 l2 : List α} {hPerm : l1.Perm l2}
  {idx1 : Fin l1.length} {idx2 : Fin l2.length} :
  l1[idx1] = l2[idx2] → (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)
  := by
  revert idx1 idx2
  induction hPerm with
  | nil => intro ⟨_, _⟩; contradiction
  | cons x l1 l2 =>
    intro (i : Fin (x :: l1).length) (j : Fin (x :: l2).length)
    intro h
    simp [List.cons_eq, List.get] at h ⊢
    <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        constructor <;>
        intro <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, List.erase_first] <;>
        try omega <;>
        try
          {
            cases i <;> cases j <;>
            simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, List.erase_first] <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try
              {
                simp_all [perm_iff_opt_same]
                <;>
                aesop
              })
          }
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [perm_iff_opt_same]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
  <;>
  simp_all [perm_iff_opt_same]
  <;>
  aesop

theorem perm_eraseIdx {l1 l2 : List α} {hPerm : l1.Perm l2}
  {idx1 : Fin l1.length} {idx2 : Fin l2.length} :
  l1[idx1] = l2[idx2] → (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)
  := by
  revert idx1 idx2
  induction hPerm with
  | nil => intro ⟨_, _⟩; contradiction
  | cons x l1 l2 =>
    intro (i : Fin (x :: l1).length) (j : Fin (x :: l2).length)
    intro h
    simp [List.cons_eq, List.get] at h ⊢
    <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        constructor <;>
        intro <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, List.erase_first] <;>

theorem perm_eraseIdx {l1 l2 : List α} {hPerm : l1.Perm l2}
  {idx1 : Fin l1.length} {idx2 : Fin l2.length} :
  l1[idx1] = l2[idx2] → (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)
  := by
  revert idx1 idx2
  induction hPerm with
  | nil => intro ⟨_, _⟩; contradiction
  | cons x l1 l2 =>
    intro (i : Fin (x :: l1).length) (j : Fin (x :: l2).length)
    intro h
    simp [List.cons_eq, List.get] at h ⊢
    <;>
    (try omega) <;>
    (try
      {
        constructor <;>
        intro <;>
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, List.erase_first] <;>
        try omega <;>
        try
          {
            cases i <;> cases j <;>
            simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, List.erase_first] <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try
              {
                simp_all [perm_iff_opt_same]
                <;>
                aesop
              })
          }
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [perm_iff_opt_same]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
  <;>
  simp_all [perm_iff_opt

              <;>
                (try { aesop }) <;>
                (try {
                  have h₁₄ : ∀ {i1 : Fin tl.length} {i2 : Fin tl'.length}, tl[i1] = tl'[i2] → (tl.eraseIdx i1).Perm (tl'.eraseIdx i2) := by
                    intro i1 i2 h_eq
                    exact h₁₁ i1 i2 h_eq
                  aesop
                })
            }) <;>
            (try {
              -- Use the permutation property to relate the lists
              have h₁₀ : tl.Perm tl' := by
                simp_all [List.Perm]
                <;>
                  aesop
              -- Use the induction hypothesis
              have h₁₁ : ∀ {i1 : Fin tl.length} {i2 : Fin tl'.length}, tl[i1] = tl'[i2] → (tl.eraseIdx i1).Perm (tl'.eraseIdx i2) := by
                intro i1 i2 h_eq
                have h₁₂ : tl.Perm tl' := h₁₀
                have h₁₃ : ∀ {i1 : Fin tl.length} {i2 : Fin tl'.length}, tl[i1] = tl'[i2] → (tl.eraseIdx i1).Perm (tl'.eraseIdx i2) := by
                  intro i1 i2 h_eq
                  exact Perm.eraseIdx_at h₁₂ i1 i2 h_eq
                exact h₁₃ i1 i2 h_eq
              -- Handle the case when i1 ≠ 0 and i2 ≠ 0
              cases i1 <;> cases i2 <;> simp_all [List.eraseIdx, List.Perm, Fin.ext_iff]
              <;>
                (try { aesop }) <;>
                (try {
                  have h₁₄ : ∀ {i1 : Fin tl.length} {i2 : Fin tl'.length}, tl[i1] = tl'[i2] → (tl.eraseIdx i1).Perm (tl'.eraseIdx i2) := by
                    intro i1 i2 h_eq
                    exact h₁₁ i1 i2 h_eq
                  aesop
                })
            })

simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
                <;>
                (try omega)
                <;>
                (try aesop)
              rw [h₁₉]
            rw [h₁₇, h₁₈] at *
            exact h₁₆
          exact h₁₂
        exact h₁₁
      exact h₈
    exact h₇
  exact h₁

simp only [Perm.cons_iff, List.get] at h ⊢
    -- We need to handle the cases where the index is 0 or greater than 0
    cases' eq_or_ne idx1.val 0 with h₁ h₁ <;>
    cases' eq_or_ne idx2.val 0 with h₂ h₂ <;>
    simp_all [Fin.ext_iff, List.eraseIdx_cons, List.eraseIdx_eq]

    (try {

    <;>

      <;>

    <;>
    (try {

      <;>
      simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try omega)
